push 10
push 10
* y              #  initialize outer counter to 100
    # loop y

    push 10                 #
    out_char                #  newline
    push 1
    push 2
    - negative1
    push 20
    push 10
    *
    * x             #  initialize inner counter to -200
        # loop x
        duplicate x_copy

        push 3
        push 2
        roll # dig up y
